checkedConditions: Shared provider cooldown recording uses full Retry-After hints beyond the short retry backoff cap.
Same-request retry delay behavior remains capped by DEFAULT_RETRY_BACKOFF_CAP_MS.
Excessively large Retry-After hints are bounded by a separate provider cooldown cap.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Direct completion gate after focused verification: same-request retry delay remains bounded by the short retry cap, while shared provider cooldowns now honor longer Retry-After hints up to DEFAULT_PROVIDER_RATE_LIMIT_COOLDOWN_CAP_MS. The focused cooldown-delay tests cover both long hints and extreme hint capping.
